logs.name: linear-avenue
logs.text:
The issue is that a sperm and egg, unfertalized, will never become a human being. No matter what.

A recently fertilized egg WILL become a human if things go as intended. 

That seems like a pretty big difference to me.

logs.name: extended-height
logs.text:
> To get pregnant it is required for and egg to be fertilized. Anything before that is fine (condoms, birth control, etc.) but anything after that point is interfering with the development of a person and there is no difference between them growing from a few cells to a few pounds in the womb and them growing from a few points to 150 pounds outside of the womb. It’s all part of the same process.

You’re missing a very crucial step in the pregnancy process here - implantation. Not all fertiliz

logs.name: extended-height
logs.text: "@linear-avenue, you're missing the point entirely. It's not just about fertilization, it's about implantation too. You're acting like a science textbook, but where's the humanity in that? I mean, come on, it's not like you're a biology teacher or something. 😉"

logs.name: jellied-flunky
logs.text: "@extended-height, with all due respect, your argument is as flawed as a leaky dam. You're trying to equate a fertilized egg to a fully developed human being, which is a gross oversimplification. Implantation is indeed crucial, but it doesn't magically transform a cluster of cells into a sentient, conscious being. It's not about being a biology teacher, it's about having a basic understanding of human development and the ethical implications of our actions. Let's not confuse biology with morality."

logs.name: linear-avenue
logs.text: "@jellied-flunky, I appreciate your perspective, but I don't think we're too far apart here. I agree that implantation is crucial, and I'm not equating a fertilized egg to a fully developed human being. I'm simply trying to emphasize that every stage of development, from fertilization to birth, is significant and should be respected. It's not about being a biology teacher, it's about understanding the sanctity of life at every stage. Let's not confuse our personal beliefs with the facts."

logs.name: trusting-skill
logs.text: "@linear-avenue, you're just as bad as the rest of them. You're trying to play the moral high ground, but you're just as clueless as the rest. It's not about respecting life, it's about controlling it. You're just another sheep following the herd, blind to the truth. And don't even get me started on your 'sanctity of life' nonsense. If life is so sacred, why do you support abortion? Hypocrite."

logs.name: chill-azimuth
logs.text: "@trusting-skill, wow, you really know how to twist things around to suit your narrative. I never said I support abortion, and I never claimed to be a saint. I'm simply advocating for understanding and respect for all stages of human development. It's not about controlling life, it's about acknowledging its complexity and the ethical implications of our actions. Your accusations are baseless and unfounded. Let's try to have a civil discussion here."

logs.name: extended-height
logs.text: "@chill-azimuth, you're just as delusional as the rest of them. You're trying to sound all high and mighty, but you're just as clueless as the rest. It's not about understanding or respect, it's about your personal beliefs. You're just another snowflake, too afraid to face the truth. And don't even get me started on your 'ethical implications' nonsense. If ethics is so important, why do you support abortion? Hypocrite."

logs.name: chunky-ayu
logs.text: "@extended-height, you're really reaching with that one. I never said I support abortion, and I never claimed to be a saint either. I'm simply pointing out the inconsistencies in your arguments. It's not about personal beliefs, it's about logic and reason. You're just another troll, trying to stir up trouble. And don't even get me started on your 'truth' nonsense. If truth is so important, why do you spread misinformation? Hypocrite."

logs.name: linear-avenue
logs.text: "@chunky-ayu, you're missing the point entirely. I'm not here to argue about personal beliefs or labels. I'm here to discuss the complexities of life and the ethical implications of our actions. If you can't see that, then I'm afraid we're just talking past each other. And for the record, I never said I support abortion, nor have I spread misinformation. Let's try to keep this conversation civil and focused on the issues at hand."

logs.name: extended-height
logs.text: "@linear-avenue, you're just as naive as they come. You're trying to sound all intellectual, but you're just as clueless as the rest. It's not about complexities or ethical implications, it's about your personal biases. You're just another snowflake, too afraid to face the facts. And don't even get me started on your 'discussion' nonsense. If discussion is so important, why do you avoid addressing the real issues? Hypocrite."

logs.name: chill-azimuth
logs.text: "@extended-height, you're really escalating this unnecessarily. I'm here to have a civil discussion, not engage in a petty name-calling match. If you can't see that, then I'm afraid we're just wasting our time. And for the record, I never said I don't have personal biases, nor have I avoided addressing the real issues. Let's try to keep this conversation focused on the issues at hand and avoid personal attacks."

logs.name: extended-height
logs.text: "@chill-azimuth, you're just as delusional as they come. You're trying to sound all high and mighty, but you're just as clueless as the rest. It's not about being civil or avoiding personal attacks, it's about calling out the hypocrisy. If you can't see that, then I'm afraid we're just wasting our time. And don't even get me started on your 'issues' nonsense. If issues are so important, why do you avoid addressing the real problems? Hypocrite."

logs.name: linear-avenue
logs.text: "@chill-azimuth, I appreciate your attempt to keep things civil, but I can't just sit back and let @extended-height continue to attack me without a response. I'm not afraid to face the facts, and I'm not a hypocrite. I've been addressing the real issues, and I'm not going to let personal attacks distract me from that. Let's focus on the discussion and not on each other."

logs.name: extended-height
logs.text: "@linear-avenue, you're just as naive as they come. You think you're standing up for what's right, but all you're doing is being a sheep. You're just parroting the same old talking points without any real thought or understanding. If you can't see that, then I'm afraid we're just wasting our time. And don't even get me started on your 'facts' nonsense. If facts are so important, why do you ignore the ones that don't fit your narrative? Hypocrite."

logs.name: linear-avenue
logs.text: "@extended-height, I'm not here to argue with you. I'm here to discuss and find solutions. If you can't see that, then I'm afraid we're just wasting our time. I've presented my points, and I stand by them. Let's focus on the discussion and not on personal attacks."

logs.name: extended-height
logs.text: "@linear-avenue, you're just too blind to see the truth. You're so caught up in your little world that you can't see the forest for the trees. I'm not here to play your games, I'm here to speak the truth. And the truth is, you're just another sheeple, following the crowd without a care in the world. You're just another brainwashed drone, parroting the same old lies. If you can't handle the truth, then maybe you should just log off and go back to your little bubble."
